languages.text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} жертвовать командой или ресурсами. Будете тянуть жребий и поедать кого-то из своих, пока не сгинете все".

traits.locale_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} жертвовать командой или ресурсами. Будете тянуть жребий и поедать кого-то из своих, пока не сгинете все".
"Я не намерен{mf||а} жертвовать командой или ресурсами. Будете тянуть жребий и поедать кого-то из своих, пока не сгинете все".

languages.text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."
languages.original_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} жертвовать командой или ресурсами. Будете тянуть жребий и поедать кого-то из своих, пока не сгинете все".

traits.locale_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."
"I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."
"I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: "Ich werde weder meine Mannschaft noch meine Ressourcen opfern. Ihr werdet Lose ziehen und eure eigenen essen, bis auch der letzte von euch weg ist."
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: "Je ne sacrifierai ni mon équipage ni mes ressources. Vous tirerez au sort et mangerez les vôtres jusqu'à ce qu'il n'en reste plus un seul."
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: "我不会牺牲我的船员和资源。你们要抽签，吃掉自己的人，直到一个不剩。"
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: "No sacrificaré mi tripulación ni mis recursos. Lo echaréis a suertes y os comeréis lo vuestro hasta que desaparezca hasta el último de vosotros".
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: 「私は乗組員も資源も犠牲にしない。クジを引き、一人残らずいなくなるまで自分のものを食べるのだ"
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."

languages.text: "Mürettebatımı ya da kaynaklarımı feda etmeyeceğim. Kura çekecek ve her biriniz ölene kadar kendinizinkini yiyeceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "I will not sacrifice my crew or resources. You will draw lots and eat your own until every last one of you is gone."
